baseline_case.description: Current baseline with assumed 007923 -> SDC-1450 / Gaillac.

confidence_table.observed_vs_assumed: Observed directly in Data_poc.xlsx relations and criticality table; no inferred supplier.

confidence_table.conclusion: Criticité élevée de item:007923 sur M-1810
confidence_table.observed_vs_assumed: Observed in BOM, but supplier mapping is assumed to SDC-1450/Gaillac.
Observed in sensitivity, policy tests and targeted capacity drop.

confidence_table.conclusion: M-1430 est le principal driver de coût
confidence_table.observed_vs_assumed: Observed in OAT sensitivity on cost; absolute level still depends on cost assumptions.

confidence_table.conclusion: La baseline à 78.8% repose fortement sur stock bootstrap + appro externe
confidence_table.observed_vs_assumed: Observed via strict mode and external-off cases; both are model assumptions, not source data.
confidence_table.evidence: Strict mode fill 0.000; external off fill 0.748.

confidence_table.conclusion: La fréquence de revue/pilotage est un levier majeur
confidence_table.observed_vs_assumed: Observed across shocks, full exploration and policy cases.

confidence_table.conclusion: Le niveau absolu de coût reste moins robuste que les tendances relatives
confidence_table.observed_vs_assumed: Transport/purchase/holding were calibrated and external procurement is stylized.
confidence_table.evidence: Baseline total cost 1273360.3; external-expensive rises to 1281823.1.

hypothesis_cases.description: Remove assumed supplier mapping for 007923 but keep other baseline assumptions.
Treat 730384 (unit M) as a tighter flow: lower supplier and factory opening stocks.
Keep external procurement but with tighter cap and slower lead.
Re-route 007923 to existing supplier SDC-VD0519670A instead of Gaillac.
Assign 007923 to a dedicated local assumed supplier near Avene.
Keep external procurement but make it much more expensive.

policy_cases.description: More buffered policy: higher safety stock and FG target.
More reactive policy: daily review, higher gap gain, lower smoothing.

disruption_cases.description: Targeted capacity reduction of 30% on M-1810.
Temporary 5-day outage of 773474 lane from Gaillac.
Temporary 5-day outage of assumed 007923 lane from Gaillac.
Temporary 5-day outage of supplier lane for 042342.

case_pareto_frontier.description: More reactive policy: daily review, higher gap gain, lower smoothing.
Assign 007923 to a dedicated local assumed supplier near Avene.
Keep external procurement but with tighter cap and slower lead.
Strict mode: no external procurement, no assumed supplier for 007923, no bootstrap.
